articles.title: Google starts rolling out QR code-based Quick Share transfers between Android and iPhone - Android Authority
articles.description: Google has started rolling out a new Quick Share feature that lets Android users share files with iPhones using QR codes.

articles.description: Following Dirty Frag, Fragnesia, and other Linux kernel vulnerabilities making themselves known in recent days, the latest now is ssh-keysign-pwn.

articles.title: Dell releases new 16-inch laptop globally with 120 Hz OLED display and Intel Panther Lake - Notebookcheck
articles.description: Dell has released a new 16-inch laptop globally. Sold with Intel Panther Lake processors and up to 32 GB of RAM, the Dell 16S can be configured with up to the Core Ultra 9 386H and a 120 Hz OLED display that outputs at 1800p (2.8K).
